race.comment: AWESOME ARTIST (5) is still a Maiden but rates strongly off his half-length defeat over 2000m at Hawkesbury. Settled handy in that and can do the same here. Will present near peak for a leading Sydney stable and break through. TAKE THE CHANCE (4) comes back in grade off an easy 58 win over 1700m at Cowra. She placed over this distance the one before and should cross the field comfortably and control the race. Has Penza aboard and will take pegging back. PARTY IT DOWN (6) jumped a $4.6 favourite this distance range in a 58 at Goulburn and didn't finish it off. Three back she impressed when winning a CL1 over 2200m at the Sapphire Coast, and that reads well. Suited in a 55 and is a winning chance. EVER WAS (3) hasn't enjoyed the best of luck since his 1.5L defeat here in a 60 over 1600m. The 2000m suits and McDougall reunites off that Canberra run. He may surprise.
